rationale: The citing paper focuses on dynamic vs. generic retargeted ad content in online travel (field experiment, browsing-signal timing), whereas the cited paper is about telecom two-/three-part tariffs, usage, and hierarchical Bayes tariff-choice modeling; the notes show little conceptual or methodological overlap.
